name: DisclaimerCoin
description: DisclaimerCoin (DONT) is a Solana-native memecoin issued by DeFi Development Corp. (Nasdaq: DFDV) as a corporate onchain experiment examining how a publicly traded company can engage directly with blockchain infrastructure and internet culture. The project does not operate a protocol, application, or platform and does not provide functional access to products or services. The project was launched to explore three specific questions: how a publicly traded company can issue a token directly onchain and hold it on its balance sheet, what corporate participation in internet-native markets looks like without traditional venture-backed token launch structures, and whether a memecoin can be launched without predatory extraction while demonstrating Solana’s transaction performance and user experience.
